[Intro]

[ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                 [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Welcome to your life, there's no turning back[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Even while we sleep, we will find you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
Acting on your best behaviour[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
Turn your back on Mother Nature[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world[/tab]

[ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]               [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
It's my own design, it's my own remorse[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Help me to decide, help me make the[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Most of freedom, and of pleasure[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
Nothing ever lasts forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
There's a room where the light wont find you[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Holding hands while the walls come tumbling down[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
When they do I'll be right behind you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
So glad we've almost made it[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]
So sad they had to fade it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world[/tab]

[ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
I can't stand this indecision[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]
Married with a lack of vision[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Say that you'll never, never, never, never need it[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]
One headline, why believe it?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Everybody wants to rule the world[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
All for freedom, and for pleasure[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
